staticText: Deterministic browser-local break-even methodology available in English, French, Swahili and Hausa. Contribution per unit equals selling price minus variable cost per unit. Contribution ratio equals contribution per unit divided by selling price. Exact break-even units equal fixed costs divided by contribution per unit. Whole break-even units round the exact units up. Exact threshold revenue equals fixed costs divided by contribution ratio; revenue at whole units equals whole units times selling price and can be slightly higher. Planned profit or loss and margin of safety remain signed. Fixed costs may be zero. Planned units and target profit are optional, but any supplied value must be finite and non-negative. Selling price must be positive and greater than variable cost. The optional unit is display-only. Never supply or infer VAT, tax, duty, exchange rates, market prices, industry benchmarks, demand forecasts, pricing recommendations or funding claims. Inputs and exports remain in the browser.
